Package jline.lang.sections

Classes that model the individual sections that form a Network node
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Buffer
    Input buffer of a station
    CacheClassSwitcher
    A class switcher section based on cache hits and misses
    CacheClassSwitcher.InputJobClassesObj  
    ClassSwitcher
    A job class switcher based on a probability table
    ClassSwitcher.CSFunInput  
    ClassSwitchOutputSection
    Output section of a queue that applies class switching upon job departure
    Dispatcher
    Output section that routes jobs
    Forker
    Output section that forks incoming jobs into sibling tasks
    InfiniteServer
    A service section with an infinite number of servers (pure delay)
    InputSection
    Input section of a station
    Joiner
    Input section of a join node
    OutputSection
    Output section of a node
    PreemptiveServer
    A preemptive service section
    RandomSource
    Input buffer of a Source
    Section
    A general class modeling a node section
    Server
    A service section that processes jobs
    ServiceSection
    A section offering a service
    ServiceTunnel
    A section that forwards jobs without introducing delays
    SharedServer
    A server shared by multiple jobs simultaneously
    StatefulClassSwitcher
    A class switcher that depends on its local state
    StatelessClassSwitcher
    A class switcher that does not keep a local state
